positive: A vibrant, abstract celestial creature design, featuring a stylized neon phoenix soaring over a minimalist geometric mountain range at sunset. The phoenix should be composed of luminous, swirling galaxies and stained-glass patterns, contrasting sharply with the dark, silhouetted mountains and deep indigo sky. Use a strong, graphic comic book aesthetic mixed with elegant celestial tapestry art. Composition must be central, symmetrical, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Color palette: electric magenta, sapphire blue, deep violet, and glowing gold accents. Style: Pop Art meets Cosmic Fantasy. Clean lines, maximum contrast, bold outlines.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, noisy, muted colors, bokeh, gradient fade, illegible, distorted
